input_text: Menteri tu cakap kat parlimen macam budak darjah 3 buat pembentangan. Otak ada ke tak ni?
reason: Mocks a minister's intelligence and speaking ability with personal insult. Rude dismissal of public figure.
suggested_rewrite: Pembentangan menteri di parlimen kurang meyakinkan. Harap kualiti perbahasan dapat ditingkatkan.

input_text: Typical la these people, asyik forward berita harga naik tapi tak pernah check betul ke tak. Pastu panic buying.
reason: Uses vague 'these people' to dismiss a group while highlighting unverified forwarded claims about price increases causing panic.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai yang forward berita harga naik tanpa semak sumber. Kita perlu pastikan maklumat tu sahih sebelum sebarkan.

input_text: Haih biasa la tu, orang macam dia memang tak boleh fikir jauh. Undi pun sebab popularlah, bukan sebab pandai.
reason: Dismisses a public figure's intelligence and implies voters are shallow. Snarky and condescending tone.
suggested_rewrite: Populariti bukan jaminan kebolehan memimpin. Pengundi perlu menilai calon berdasarkan rekod dan kebolehan.

input_text: Surau depan rumah tu pukul 4 pagi dah pasang speaker full blast. Aku respect la tapi bro ada limit kan? Orang nak tidur juga.
reason: Complaint about surau speaker volume with eye-rolling tone about religious practices. Could inflame religious sensitivities.
suggested_rewrite: Speaker surau depan rumah agak kuat pada waktu pagi. Mungkin boleh dikurangkan sedikit demi keselesaan jiran.

input_text: OKU parking lot kat mall tu selalu kena rampas. Tapi honestly la, berapa sangat la OKU yang pergi mall kan?
reason: Dismissive view of disability accommodation, implying OKU people don't need parking because they rarely visit malls.
suggested_rewrite: Parking OKU di mall perlu dijaga dengan lebih baik. Hak mereka untuk kemudahan ini perlu dihormati.

input_text: Woi sial, potong line macam bapak dia punya jalan! Memang la orang area situ tak reti drive.
reason: Rude and vulgar reaction to bad driving with a neighborhood-based stereotype about drivers from a certain area.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu yang potong queue membahayakan pengguna jalan raya. Penguatkuasaan perlu diperketatkan.

input_text: Ahli politik tu IQ dia berapa eh? Tengok jawapan dia kat parlimen rasa nak ketuk kepala sendiri.
reason: Questions a politician's IQ in a mocking manner. Personal attack on intelligence based on parliamentary performance.
suggested_rewrite: Jawapan ahli politik di parlimen kurang memuaskan. Rakyat berhak mendapat wakil yang lebih berkualiti.

input_text: Kuil tu setiap kali festival bising sampai pukul 2 pagi. Kita nak complain nanti kata kita tak respect. Macam mana ni?
reason: Eye-rolling about temple festival noise with implied frustration about being unable to complain due to religious sensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Festival di kuil kadang-kadang bising hingga lewat malam. Mungkin boleh berbincang dengan pihak kuil tentang had masa yang sesuai.

input_text: JPJ counter tu punya lambat, staff kat belakang tengok phone je. Gaji buta betul la korang ni.
reason: Accuses JPJ staff of being lazy and drawing salary without working. Snarky comment about civil servant work ethic.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di kaunter JPJ agak lambat. Harap pihak pengurusan boleh tingkatkan kecekapan perkhidmatan.

input_text: Biasa la orang Cheras memang macam tu, honk sana honk sini macam jalan raya rumah nenek dia.
reason: Snide generalization about Cheras residents' driving behavior. Neighborhood-based stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Ada pemandu yang suka honk tanpa sebab di Cheras. Kesabaran dan budi bahasa di jalan raya perlu dipupuk.

input_text: Group WhatsApp family aku forward harga beras naik 200%. Mak aku dah panic beli 10 kilo extra. Bodoh betul la percaya benda macam ni.
reason: Calls family members stupid for believing unverified rice price claims while highlighting the panic buying effect of misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Mesej viral tentang harga beras naik 200% belum disahkan. Semak sumber rasmi sebelum membuat pembelian panik.

input_text: Menteri Pendidikan tu cakap pasal STEM tapi dia sendiri nak spell 'technology' pun tak lepas kot. LOL.
reason: Mocks the Education Minister's intelligence, implying they cannot even spell. Sarcastic personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Menteri Pendidikan perlu menunjukkan kefahaman mendalam tentang STEM agar dasar pendidikan lebih meyakinkan.

input_text: Pejabat JPN punya lembab, nak buat IC pun ambil 3 jam. Staff pun muka masam macam aku hutang duit dia.
reason: Snarky remark about JPN staff being slow and unfriendly. Generalized negative portrayal of civil servants.
suggested_rewrite: Proses di pejabat JPN mengambil masa yang lama. Harap perkhidmatan boleh dipercepatkan untuk keselesaan orang ramai.

input_text: Aku dah muak tengok kereta double park depan sekolah Tamil tu. Setiap pagi sama je cerita, typical la kan.
reason: Complaint about double parking specifically singling out Tamil school with 'typical' remark adding communal dimension.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking depan sekolah setiap pagi menyebabkan kesesakan. Pihak berkuasa perlu sediakan zon henti-sebentar.

input_text: Kereta tu signal pun tak nak bagi, terus potong masuk lane aku. Memang dasar pemandu bodoh area Klang ni.
reason: Rude reaction to bad driving with area-based stereotype targeting Klang drivers specifically.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu yang menukar lane tanpa signal sangat berbahaya. Penguatkuasaan undang-undang jalan raya perlu ditingkatkan.

input_text: Kawasan Sentul tu memang la macam tu, kotor dan sesak. Orang situ pun sama je, tak reti jaga kebersihan.
reason: Snide remark about Sentul neighborhood extending the insult to its residents. Area-based prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan Sentul menghadapi isu kebersihan dan kesesakan. Usaha bersama penduduk dan pihak berkuasa diperlukan.

input_text: Pejabat pos tu staff dia buat muka je. Kau tanya soalan sikit macam kau mengganggu hidup dia. Civil servant mentality la tu.
reason: Snarky comment about civil servant attitude at the post office, generalizing poor work ethic to the entire public sector.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di pejabat pos kurang mesra. Latihan khidmat pelanggan boleh membantu tingkatkan pengalaman rakyat.

input_text: Forwarded as received: Harga tepung naik 300% bulan depan!!! Cepat beli sekarang sebelum habis!!! Sumber dari orang dalam kerajaan.
reason: Classic forwarded unverified claim about flour price increase with false 'government insider' source. Causes panic buying.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan harga tepung naik 300% belum disahkan oleh mana-mana sumber rasmi. Sila semak KPDNHEP sebelum sebarkan.

input_text: Brader tu bawak Myvi macam bawak Ferrari. Zig zag sana sini, typical la pemandu area Shah Alam.
reason: Rude reaction to bad driving paired with a stereotype about Shah Alam area drivers.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu yang memandu secara berbahaya di jalan raya perlu diambil tindakan tanpa mengira kawasan.

input_text: Orang kampung memang macam ni la, forward je semua benda tanpa fikir. Harga minyak masak naik 500% konon. Gullible betul.
reason: Dismisses rural people as gullible for forwarding unverified cooking oil price claims. Condescending stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Mesej viral tentang harga minyak masak naik 500% tidak benar. Kita perlu bantu saling ingat supaya semak fakta sebelum kongsi.

input_text: Civil servant keje 9-5 pun tak boleh settle, lunch break 2 jam. Private sector mana boleh macam tu bro.
reason: Snarky accusation that civil servants take 2-hour lunch breaks, contrasting them unfavorably with private sector.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada penjawat awam yang mengambil rehat terlalu lama, pihak pengurusan perlu memastikan disiplin kerja dijaga.

input_text: Kawasan Setapak tu malam-malam memang tak selamat. Jenis orang kat situ pun kita tau la macam mana.
reason: Snide insinuation about Setapak residents using vague 'jenis orang kat situ'. Area-based prejudice with communal undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan Setapak ada isu keselamatan pada waktu malam. Peningkatan rondaan dan lampu jalan boleh membantu.

input_text: Aku share je la, kawan aku kata harga gula akan naik RM10 sekilo bulan depan. Dia kerja kilang gula. Betul ke tak wallahu alam tapi better stock up.
reason: Spreads unverified sugar price claim with false authority from 'friend who works at sugar factory'. Encourages panic buying.
suggested_rewrite: Ada dakwaan harga gula akan naik mendadak tetapi belum disahkan. Sila rujuk KPDNHEP untuk maklumat harga terkini.

input_text: Pemandu Grab area PJ ni semua bawak macam nak kejar hantu. Redlight pun langgar. Orang lain kat jalan pun nyawa la.
reason: Generalizes all PJ Grab drivers as reckless. Rude area-based stereotype about driving behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Ada pemandu e-hailing yang memandu secara berbahaya. Aduan boleh dibuat melalui aplikasi untuk keselamatan penumpang dan pengguna jalan.

input_text: Pagi-pagi lagi dah dengar bunyi loceng gereja. Weekend pun tak boleh tidur dengan aman. Pehal la tak consider jiran?
reason: Eye-rolling about church bell noise on weekends. Dismissive complaint about religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Bunyi loceng gereja pada waktu pagi agak mengganggu tidur. Mungkin boleh berbincang dengan pihak gereja untuk penyelesaian.

input_text: Setiap kali nak bayar cukai kat LHDN, staff buat muka selamba je. Kita bayar gaji korang tau. Sikit pun tak grateful.
reason: Snarky 'we pay your salary' remark to LHDN staff. Condescending and dismissive of civil servants.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman di kaunter LHDN kurang memuaskan. Perkhidmatan mesra pelanggan dapat tingkatkan kepercayaan rakyat.

input_text: Kakitangan KWSP tu kalau boleh memang nak buat kita beratur sampai petang. Kerja slow macam tak ada deadline. Mentality kerajaan la katakan.
reason: Accuses KWSP staff of deliberately making people queue and attributes slowness to 'government mentality'.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di KWSP boleh ditingkatkan dengan sistem giliran yang lebih efisien dan pengurusan kaunter yang lebih baik.

input_text: Diorang ni buat rumah ibadat kat tengah-tengah kawasan perumahan, lepas tu nak expect orang tak complain pasal bunyi. Logik ke?
reason: Frustrated complaint about places of worship in residential areas with dismissive tone toward religious communities.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan rumah ibadat di kawasan perumahan perlu mengambil kira keselesaan penduduk. Dialog antara pihak berkuasa dan jemaah boleh membantu.

input_text: Hari-hari aku stuck kat traffic Puchong sebab lane khas OKU yang kosong je sepanjang masa. Membazir ruang jalan.
reason: Resents OKU-designated lanes as a waste of road space. Dismissive view of disability accommodation.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan di Puchong perlu ditangani. Lane OKU penting untuk keselamatan dan boleh diintegrasikan dengan perancangan trafik yang lebih baik.

input_text: Mak aku forward gambar resit kedai tulis harga minyak masak RM50. Aku check kedai sama tu harga biasa je. Orang tua ni memang senang kena tipu.
reason: Calls elderly people easy to fool while debunking a fake receipt about cooking oil prices. Condescending toward older generation.
suggested_rewrite: Gambar resit palsu tentang harga minyak masak RM50 sedang tular. Bantu keluarga kita semak maklumat sebelum percaya dan sebarkan.

input_text: Kawasan tu memang la macam tu. Pegi sekali je dah tau jenis penduduk dia macam mana. Tak payah explain lebih.
reason: Vague insinuation about a neighborhood's residents with 'tak payah explain' adding coded hostility. Area-based prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kawasan ada cabaran tersendiri. Usaha bersama antara penduduk dan pihak berkuasa boleh memperbaiki keadaan.

input_text: Weh korang dengar tak, subsidi minyak nak tarik balik totally bulan depan? Member aku yang kerja Petronas cakap. Isi penuh tangki sekarang!
reason: Spreads false claim about total fuel subsidy removal attributed to Petronas insider. Could cause panic buying at petrol stations.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat khabar angin tentang penarikan subsidi minyak. Sila rujuk kenyataan rasmi kerajaan untuk maklumat tepat.

input_text: Jabatan Imigresen tu semua staff macam robot. Takde senyum, takde salam. Kau pergi sana rasa macam kau penjenayah.
reason: Calls immigration staff robots and says visiting feels like being treated as a criminal. Snarky about civil servants.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di Jabatan Imigresen boleh lebih mesra. Suasana yang positif dapat membuat proses lebih selesa untuk semua.

input_text: Datuk tu cakap nak bantu rakyat miskin, lepas tu naik kereta RM2 juta. Otak letak mana kalau nak tipu pun pandai sikit la.
reason: Mocks a Datuk's intelligence and sincerity, calling them a bad liar. Sarcastic attack on public figure.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidakselarasan antara kenyataan pemimpin dan gaya hidup mereka menimbulkan persoalan. Pemimpin perlu lebih konsisten.

input_text: Ada sesiapa notice tak, setiap kali hari perayaan jenis tertentu mesti jalan sesak. Kena la considerate sikit, orang lain pun nak guna jalan.
reason: Uses vague 'jenis tertentu' to reference specific religious celebrations causing traffic. Eye-rolling tone.
suggested_rewrite: Perayaan kadang menyebabkan kesesakan jalan. Perancangan trafik yang lebih baik oleh pihak berkuasa dapat membantu semua pihak.

input_text: That MP ah, every time open mouth confirm say something stupid one. How this kind of people become leader?
reason: Mocks an MP's intelligence repeatedly. Dismissive personal attack on a public figure's competence.
suggested_rewrite: That MP's public statements often lack substance. Voters deserve better-informed representation.

input_text: Every time someone forward these 'sugar price naik 50%' messages I just laugh la. These people never learn to check facts one.
reason: Dismissive attitude toward people who share unverified price increase claims. Condescending tone while addressing misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified messages about sugar price hikes keep circulating. It's important to check official sources before sharing.

input_text: Government servant ah, 8am start work but 8.30 still at mamak having roti canai. No wonder la everything so slow.
reason: Snarky stereotype about civil servants being lazy and arriving late. Dismissive generalization of public sector workers.
suggested_rewrite: Punctuality in government offices could be improved. Timely service benefits everyone.

input_text: This YB talk in parliament like reading bedtime story. So boring and no substance. How la like this our country want to maju?
reason: Mocks a parliamentarian's speaking style and intelligence. Dismissive of their capability to lead the country.
suggested_rewrite: This YB's parliamentary speeches could be more substantive. We need leaders who engage meaningfully in policy debates.

input_text: Disable people want ramp everywhere, special toilet, special parking. Everything also special treatment. Other people also got needs what.
reason: Dismissive and resentful view of disability accommodation, framing accessibility as unfair special treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Accessibility features like ramps and OKU parking benefit everyone, including elderly and injured persons. Inclusivity is important.

input_text: My aunty forward me message saying cooking oil will be RM30 next month. I told her fake news la but she insist 'someone in government told her'. These people ah cannot be helped.
reason: Describes forwarding of unverified cooking oil price claims with condescending dismissal of people who believe them.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims about cooking oil prices are circulating. Encourage family members to verify with official sources like KPDNHEP.

input_text: Every Deepavali sure la the whole taman got noise until midnight. Fireworks somemore. Other people don't celebrate also kena tahan.
reason: Eye-rolling about Deepavali celebrations with 'other people' framing that creates communal divide around religious festivities.
suggested_rewrite: Deepavali fireworks can be noisy late at night. Community guidelines on celebration hours would help everyone enjoy the festival responsibly.

input_text: Honestly the wheelchair ramp at that mall is a joke. But then again how many wheelchair people actually go shopping there?
reason: Dismisses wheelchair accessibility by questioning whether disabled people visit malls. Undermines need for accommodation.
suggested_rewrite: The wheelchair ramp at that mall needs improvement. Proper accessibility encourages more people with disabilities to visit.

input_text: That new housing minister ah, I don't think he even knows what a B40 flat looks like. IQ probably lower than the flat number.
reason: Mocks the housing minister's intelligence and implies they are disconnected from B40 reality. Personal attack.
suggested_rewrite: The housing minister should visit B40 communities to better understand their challenges before making policy decisions.

input_text: Temple near my house every weekend got loud prayer until 10pm. I'm not against religion la but got consideration or not?
reason: Complaint about temple prayer noise framed with eye-rolling tone. Dismissive of religious practices despite qualifying statement.
suggested_rewrite: The temple nearby has loud prayers until late evening on weekends. A respectful conversation about noise levels could help.

input_text: Every Chinese New Year the firecrackers ah, non-stop from morning to night. Illegal somemore but nobody cares. Typical la.
reason: Eye-rolling about CNY firecracker noise with dismissive 'typical' framing. Targets a specific community's celebration.
suggested_rewrite: Illegal firecrackers during Chinese New Year pose safety risks. Enforcement of regulations would help ensure safe celebrations.

input_text: Chow Kit area is just hopeless la. Dirty, smelly, full of dodgy people. Don't know why government don't just clean up the whole place.
reason: Snide remarks about Chow Kit neighborhood and its residents, calling them 'dodgy people'. Area-based prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Chow Kit faces cleanliness and safety challenges. Urban renewal and community support could greatly improve the area.

input_text: Why must we make special lane for wheelchair in the office ah? So much space wasted. Just help them push can already what.
reason: Dismissive of wheelchair accessibility in offices, sees it as wasted space. Undermines disability accommodation rights.
suggested_rewrite: Wheelchair-accessible pathways in offices ensure independence and dignity for persons with disabilities. It's a necessary investment.

input_text: Someone in my group chat say next week all toll price naik double. Dunno real or not but just sharing in case. Better safe than sorry right?
reason: Forwards unverified toll price increase with 'better safe than sorry' justification that normalizes sharing misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: An unverified claim about toll prices doubling is circulating. Check the official toll operator website before believing or sharing.

input_text: OKU toilet always locked or used as store room. But seriously la kan, is it really that many OKU using public toilet?
reason: Acknowledges OKU toilet misuse but then dismissively questions the actual need for disability-accessible toilets.
suggested_rewrite: OKU toilets are often misused as storerooms. These facilities must be kept accessible for persons with disabilities who need them.

input_text: I think our Transport Minister got his degree from clown school la. Every policy he announce also make no sense.
reason: Mocks the Transport Minister's education and intelligence. Sarcastic personal attack on public figure.
suggested_rewrite: The Transport Minister's recent policies have been poorly received. More research-backed approaches would improve public confidence.

input_text: These people typical la, one person say price naik then whole kampung go and panic buy. No wonder always shortage.
reason: Vague 'these people' and 'whole kampung' dismissal when discussing panic buying caused by unverified price claims.
suggested_rewrite: Panic buying caused by unverified price claims leads to shortages. Verifying information before reacting helps everyone.

input_text: Just received message say RON95 going up to RM5. Not sure true or not but better full tank now just in case bro.
reason: Forwards unverified RON95 price increase claim with 'better safe than sorry' reasoning that encourages panic buying.
suggested_rewrite: An unverified claim about RON95 rising to RM5 is circulating. Check official government announcements before panic buying.

input_text: Church group every Sunday block the whole road for parking. Other people want to use road also cannot. So inconsiderate.
reason: Targets church-goers specifically as inconsiderate for parking issues. Religious dimension adds sensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Sunday parking near the church causes road congestion. Better parking arrangements would benefit the whole community.

input_text: Government hospital nurse ask me wait, then I see her scrolling TikTok at the counter. These government people really no shame one ah.
reason: Accuses a nurse of scrolling TikTok during work and generalizes to all government workers. Snarky civil servant criticism.
suggested_rewrite: I noticed slow service at the hospital. Healthcare workers have heavy workloads, but patient care should remain the priority.

input_text: 那个部长讲话简直像小学生背书，脑子里装的是什么啊？难怪国家搞成这样。
reason: Mocks a minister's intelligence, comparing them to a primary school student. Rude personal attack in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 部长的讲话缺乏深度和说服力。希望政府能提升施政水平。

input_text: 每次经过那个庙，烧金纸的烟熏到整条街都是。做么不能想想别人的感受？真的很自私。
reason: Eye-rolling complaint about temple incense/joss paper burning calling practitioners selfish. Dismissive of religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: 庙宇烧金纸产生的烟影响周围居民。希望能找到兼顾宗教习俗和邻里舒适的方案。

input_text: 这些议员说话像没脑子一样，说什么人民都不信了。选他们出来干什么？
reason: Mocks MPs as brainless and questions why they were elected. Rude dismissal of public figures' intelligence.
suggested_rewrite: 一些议员的发言缺乏说服力，公众对其信任度下降。希望他们能更认真对待职责。

input_text: 这些公务员每天准时下班，做事慢吞吞的，拿着铁饭碗还不珍惜。
reason: Snarky generalization about civil servants leaving on time and working slowly. Dismissive of public sector workers in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的服务效率有待提升。希望能改善流程让公众获得更好的体验。

input_text: 看到那个政客在记者会上答非所问，真怀疑他到底有没有读过大学。太丢脸了。
reason: Questions whether a politician attended university based on their press conference performance. Mocking intelligence.
suggested_rewrite: 那个政客在记者会上的回答令人失望。公众期望政治人物能更专业地回应提问。

input_text: 那些转发说鸡蛋要涨到十块钱一粒的人，脑子是不是进水了？不过话说回来，这些人就是喜欢制造恐慌。
reason: Insults people forwarding unverified egg price claims while also highlighting the misinformation problem.
suggested_rewrite: 关于鸡蛋价格暴涨的消息未经证实。请参考官方来源，不要转发未验证的信息。

input_text: 我叔叔转发说汽油下个月要涨到五块钱。他说是政府内部人说的。这种假消息传来传去真的受不了。
reason: Describes uncle forwarding false petrol price claim attributed to government insider. Highlights frustration with misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 关于汽油涨到五块钱的消息未经证实。请参考官方公告，不要转发未经核实的信息。

input_text: 每次经过那个住宅区就知道了，那里的人就是那种的。不用我多说你也明白。
reason: Vague coded language about residents of a neighborhood being 'that kind of people'. Implies communal prejudice without being explicit.
suggested_rewrite: 那个住宅区需要更好的基础设施和社区支持来改善居住环境。

input_text: 每次看到那些政客在社交媒体上发些没营养的东西，真怀疑他们的智商是不是倒着长的。
reason: Suggests politicians' IQ grows backwards based on their social media posts. Mocking intelligence in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 一些政客的社交媒体内容缺乏实质。公众期望他们能分享更有意义的政策信息。

input_text: 看那个议员回答记者问题，跟个白痴似的。这种智商怎么当领导？马来西亚真的没救了。
reason: Calls an MP an idiot and declares Malaysia hopeless based on their intelligence. Extreme mockery of public figure.
suggested_rewrite: 该议员在记者会上的表现不理想。我们需要更有能力的领导者来推动国家发展。

input_text: 政府部门的人做事像乌龟一样慢，问他什么都说'等一下'。我看他们的'一下'就是一辈子。
reason: Compares government workers to turtles and mocks their 'wait a moment' response. Snarky about civil servant work ethic.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的服务速度有待提升。更清晰的流程和时间预估能改善公众体验。

input_text: 那个区域的人就是那样，你跟他们讲道理等于对牛弹琴。不要浪费时间。
reason: Dismisses residents of a specific area as unreasonable using 'playing music to a cow' idiom. Coded area-based hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 与邻里沟通有时需要耐心。社区对话和互相理解能帮助解决问题。

input_text: 我邻居每天晚上念经念到十一点。我尊重你的信仰，但是能不能小声一点？太自私了吧。
reason: Calls neighbor selfish for nightly chanting until 11pm. Complaint about religious practice noise despite claiming respect.
suggested_rewrite: 邻居晚间的宗教活动声音较大。可以友好地沟通，找到双方都舒适的解决方案。

input_text: 那些残障人士的停车位占了那么多位置，但我从来没看到有人用过。这不是浪费空间吗？
reason: Questions disability parking as wasted space due to perceived low usage. Dismissive of accessibility needs in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 残障人士停车位是法律规定的必要设施。即使使用频率看起来不高，它们确保了有需要的人能够获得公平的出行机会。

input_text: அந்த அரசியல்வாதி பேசுறதை கேட்டா சிரிப்பு வரும். அவனுக்கு எதுவும் புரியலை, ஆனா ego மட்டும் பெருசு.
reason: Mocks a politician's intelligence and ego in Tamil. Laughing at their lack of understanding.
suggested_rewrite: அந்த அரசியல்வாதியின் பேச்சு சமூகத்தின் எதிர்பார்ப்பை பூர்த்தி செய்யவில்லை. தலைவர்கள் மேலும் தகுதியாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த மந்திரிக்கு ஒன்றும் தெரியாது, ஆனா பேசுவார் ரொம்ப. யாராவது அவர் வாயை மூடச் சொல்லுங்க.
reason: Says a minister knows nothing but talks too much and asks someone to shut them up. Rude attack on intelligence.
suggested_rewrite: மந்திரியின் அறிக்கைகள் உண்மையான புரிதலை பிரதிபலிக்கவில்லை. பொறுப்பான தலைமை அவசியம்.

input_text: அரசாங்க அலுவலகத்தில் போனா அவங்க மணிக்கு ஒரு file மட்டுமே பார்ப்பாங்க. Private sector-ல இப்படி வேலை செய்தா வெளியே தான்.
reason: Snarky comparison between government office speed and private sector in Tamil. Implies civil servants would be fired elsewhere.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க அலுவலகங்களின் சேவை வேகம் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். திறமையான செயல்முறைகள் அனைவருக்கும் பயனளிக்கும்.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் ஊனமுற்றவர்களுக்கு சலுகை கொடுத்தால் மற்றவர்களுக்கு என்ன? எல்லாருக்கும் கஷ்டம் இருக்கு.
reason: Questions why disabled people get accommodations, arguing everyone has hardships. Dismissive of disability needs in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஊனமுற்றவர்களுக்கான வசதிகள் அனைவரின் சமத்துவத்தை உறுதிப்படுத்துகின்றன. இது அடிப்படை உரிமை.

input_text: இந்த ஊர்ல wheelchair ramp வேண்டாம்னு சொல்ல முடியாது, ஆனா யார் use பண்றாங்க? காசு வீணா போகுது.
reason: Questions the need for wheelchair ramps as a waste of money in Tamil. Dismissive of disability accommodation.
suggested_rewrite: Wheelchair ramp வசதிகள் ஊனமுற்றவர்களின் அடிப்படை உரிமை. இவை சரியாக பராமரிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: அந்த இடத்தில் ஓட்டுறவங்க எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரி. Signal போடாம, speed-ல போவாங்க. அந்த area ஆளுங்களுக்கு license-ஐ free-யா கொடுத்தாங்களா?
reason: Stereotypes all drivers from a specific area as reckless in Tamil. Sarcastically asks if they got free licenses.
suggested_rewrite: சில பகுதிகளில் போக்குவரத்து விதிமீறல்கள் அதிகமாக உள்ளன. சாலை பாதுகாப்பு விழிப்புணர்வு அதிகரிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த minister-கிட்ட கேள்வி கேட்டா, robot-ஐ விட மோசமா பதில் சொல்வார். Brain-ல ஒன்றுமே இல்லை போல.
reason: Says a minister answers worse than a robot and seems to have nothing in their brain. Intelligence mockery in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த மந்திரியின் பதில்கள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். மக்கள் தெளிவான மற்றும் பொருத்தமான பதில்களை எதிர்பார்க்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: அந்த தெருவில் இரவு நேரத்தில் போறது ஆபத்து. அங்க இருக்கிற ஆட்கள் பத்தி சொல்ல வேண்டாம், நீங்களே புரிஞ்சுக்குவீங்க.
reason: Says a street is dangerous at night and uses 'you know what kind of people' coded language in Tamil. Area-based prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: அந்த தெருவில் இரவு நேர பாதுகாப்பு மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். அதிக விளக்குகள் மற்றும் CCTV நிறுவுதல் உதவியாக இருக்கும்.

input_text: இந்த நகரசபை ஊழியர்கள் என்ன வேலை செய்றாங்கன்னு யாருக்காவது தெரியுமா? சாலையெல்லாம் குழி, drain எல்லாம் அடைப்பு.
reason: Rhetorically asks what municipal workers actually do, pointing to potholes and clogged drains. Snarky civil servant criticism in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: நகரசபை சாலை மற்றும் வடிகால் பராமரிப்பை மேம்படுத்த வேண்டும். குடிமக்கள் புகார்களை முறையாக சமர்ப்பிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Confirm la these people share without reading. WhatsApp uncle forward petrol price naik RM5 per liter. Mana logik bro?
reason: Dismissive 'these people' and 'WhatsApp uncle' stereotype while calling out unverified petrol price claims.
suggested_rewrite: There's a viral claim about petrol hitting RM5/liter which is unverified. Always check official sources before forwarding.

input_text: Bukan I racist ah, but that area memang la dodgy. Go there at night you see la what kind of people hanging around.
reason: Classic 'I'm not racist but' disclaimer followed by coded area-based prejudice about 'what kind of people' hang around.
suggested_rewrite: That area has safety concerns at night. Better security measures and community programs could improve the situation.

input_text: Bhai bawak motor ni memang lain macam, lawan arus pun berani. Nak mati cepat ke apa? Typical la jenis ni.
reason: Uses 'Bhai' (ethnic term) paired with 'jenis ni' when reacting rudely to bad motorcycle riding, adding communal dimension to road rage.
suggested_rewrite: Penunggang motosikal yang lawan arus sangat berbahaya. Penguatkuasaan perlu ditingkatkan untuk keselamatan semua.

input_text: I dah fed up la bro with government counter. Pergi LHDN pun kena tunggu 3 jam, staff relax je borak kat belakang.
reason: Mixed Malay-English rant about LHDN wait times, accusing staff of chatting while people wait. Snarky civil servant criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Waiting 3 hours at LHDN is frustrating. An appointment system and more efficient processes would help reduce wait times.

input_text: These la the type of people who believe everything on WhatsApp. Flour RM50 a kilo? Come on la guna otak sikit.
reason: Condescendingly tells people to 'use their brain' about fake flour price claims using mixed Malay-English. Insulting while addressing misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Claims of flour reaching RM50/kg are false. Encourage fact-checking through official channels like KPDNHEP before sharing.

input_text: Aiyah temple festival time sure la road all kena close. Then when we complain they kata kita 'not tolerant'. Hello, tolerance goes both ways la.
reason: Eye-rolling about temple festival road closures using mixed language, dismissing calls for tolerance. Creates us-vs-them framing.
suggested_rewrite: Road closures during temple festivals affect traffic. Advance notice and alternative routes would help balance celebration and convenience.

input_text: Bro that Taman Sentosa area you think I dare jalan alone at night ah? The kind of orang hanging around there... tau la kan.
reason: Snide insinuation about people in Taman Sentosa using mixed Malay-English with vague 'tau la kan'. Neighborhood prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Taman Sentosa could benefit from improved night safety measures like better street lighting and CCTV coverage.

input_text: Wey that kampung area got so many disability ramps tapi half the time nobody use. Waste of duit rakyat I tell you.
reason: Mixed-language complaint framing disability ramps as waste of taxpayer money. Dismissive of accessibility rights.
suggested_rewrite: Disability ramps are essential infrastructure even if usage appears low. They ensure equal access for all community members.

input_text: I heard from someone la, apparently semua mamak shops kena raise price because government increase tax secretly. Confirm coming ni bro.
reason: Spreads unverified claim about secret government tax increase affecting mamak prices in mixed language. Uses 'confirm coming' to add false certainty.
suggested_rewrite: There are rumours about tax increases affecting food prices. No official announcement has been made. Check government sources for facts.

input_text: These civil servants ingat they untouchable is it? Private sector we buat one mistake kena fire. Government side, tidur on job also got increment.
reason: Mixed-language claim that civil servants are untouchable and get pay rises even while sleeping. Snarky public-vs-private sector comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Accountability standards in the public sector should be strengthened. Performance-based evaluations benefit service delivery.

input_text: Got one uncle in the family group kata all chicken in Malaysia got virus, don't eat. Share some random article from 2019 somemore. Orang tua ni memang macam tu la.
reason: Mixed-language mockery of elderly relative for sharing outdated chicken virus article. Condescending stereotype about older people.
suggested_rewrite: An outdated article about poultry safety is being shared. Current food safety information should be sourced from the Ministry of Health.

input_text: YB kita ni kan, cakap English pun tunggang langgang. Nak represent Malaysia overseas? So embarrassing la bro.
reason: Mixed-language mockery of a YB's English proficiency, calling their international representation embarrassing.
suggested_rewrite: Kemahiran bahasa Inggeris wakil rakyat penting untuk hubungan antarabangsa. Latihan bahasa boleh membantu meningkatkan kecekapan.

input_text: My family WhatsApp group ah, every day ada new forward saying prices going up. Semalam beras, hari ni telur, esok apa? They believe everything also one.
reason: Mixed-language mockery of family for believing daily unverified price increase forwards. Highlights misinformation problem.
suggested_rewrite: Daily unverified messages about price increases cause unnecessary worry. Encourage family to check official sources before believing.

input_text: Wheelchair access kat LRT tu pun separuh rosak. But then kan, I rarely see disabled people take LRT. Maybe they memang tak need it kot.
reason: Mixed-language observation about broken wheelchair access leading to dismissive conclusion that disabled people don't need LRT.
suggested_rewrite: Broken wheelchair access at LRT stations discourages disabled users. Fixing these facilities would increase ridership for all.

input_text: Serious question: do our ministers even read the reports before speaking? Because half the time they sound like they Googled it 5 minutes before.
reason: Sarcastic question about ministers' preparedness, implying they Google answers last minute. Mocking their competence.
suggested_rewrite: Ministers should demonstrate thorough knowledge of their briefs. Better preparation leads to more credible public communication.

input_text: Lol the new minister's speech was like ChatGPT wrote it on low battery mode. Zero substance, all filler. Braincells sold separately I guess.
reason: Mocks a minister's speech as AI-generated garbage and jokes about missing brain cells. Creative but demeaning intelligence attack.
suggested_rewrite: The new minister's speech lacked depth and substance. Public addresses should contain clear policy positions and actionable plans.

input_text: The way our Health Minister talks about pandemic preparedness, I seriously doubt he passed Biology in school. So clueless.
reason: Questions Health Minister's basic science knowledge. Mocking intelligence based on public statements.
suggested_rewrite: The Health Minister's pandemic preparedness plans need more scientific grounding. Expert advisory input would strengthen policy.

input_text: That YB from Perak I think standard 6 student also can give better answer la. Every press conference also embarrass himself.
reason: Says a standard 6 student could outperform a Perak YB. Mocking intelligence through press conference performance.
suggested_rewrite: The YB from Perak's press conferences have been underwhelming. More preparation would help improve public communication.

input_text: If you think about it la, these special needs people want everything catered to them. Normal people also struggle okay, don't see us asking for special treatment.
reason: Frames disability accommodation as unfair 'special treatment' and compares to 'normal people' struggles. Dismissive of disability rights.
suggested_rewrite: Accessibility isn't special treatment — it's ensuring equal opportunity. Supporting persons with disabilities benefits our entire community.

input_text: 公务员的态度就像你欠他钱一样。去办个手续要看他脸色，真的服了。
reason: Says civil servants act like you owe them money. Snarky generalization about government worker attitudes in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 公务员的服务态度可以更友善。良好的客户服务培训能提升公众的办事体验。

input_text: அந்த அரசாங்க ஊழியர்கள் காலையில வந்து sign போட்டுட்டு, பின்ன coffee shop-ல உக்காந்துருவாங்க. இது தான் வேலையா?
reason: Accuses government employees of signing in then going to coffee shop. Snarky about civil servant work ethic in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க ஊழியர்களின் வேலை நேரத்தை கண்காணிப்பது நிர்வாகத்தின் பொறுப்பு. சேவை தரம் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Immigration office bro, I took number at 8am, kena serve at 2pm. Staff inside ada AC, slowly slowly buat kerja. We outside melting like ice cream.
reason: Mixed-language sarcastic description of immigration office wait times, implying staff are comfortable while public suffers.
suggested_rewrite: Long wait times at the Immigration office are frustrating. An online appointment system could significantly reduce waiting.
